response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:09: Intro talk. 2. 00:09-00:36: Title screen with background music. 3. 00:36-04:56: Main skit 'Body Search Training'. Background music contains the phrase 'For Justice!'. Searched for VTuber song, Justice 2nd, etc. No public lyrics found for this original BGM track.
response.global_summary: The video features a skit titled "How to Protect JUSTICE!" performed by two VTubers acting as police officers, conducting a "body search training". The skit involves comedic dialogue and physical interaction, set against the backdrop of background music containing the lyrics "For Justice!".

scenes.description: Two VTubers on a couch, introducing the skit titled 'How to Protect JUSTICE!'. No vocal music is playing.
A sequence showing the title 'How to Protect JUSTICE!' with background music.

Main skit portion: The VTubers conduct a 'body search training' session. Background vocal music playing throughout contains the repeated phrase 'For Justice!'. This appears to be an original background track for the skit and no public lyrics could be found.
